segments.text: Am I speaking to Soumya Ranjan Gotre?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Dr. Tasnim speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. This call was regarding your medical interview, so is it the right time to speak to you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Shall I continue in English or Hindi?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So kindly note that this call is being recorded by the company for the policy and for the quality and audit purpose. We have received your insurance proposal and for further processing we'll be requiring to do a telephonic medical verification in which we'll be asking you medical and verification details. The questions will be on the basis of your insurance application form and this recorded call will take around 10 to 12 minutes. So can I continue with the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So the information provided by you about your health and habits will form the part of your insurance application form and if the proposal gets accepted then there will be a legal contract of insurance formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance. Any wrong information or misleading information can affect the policy or your policy may get terminated or rejected before or after the issuance of the policy and your claims may get rejected. So please answer thoughtfully and correct, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So your details are in front of me so for your your full name is Soumya Ranjan Rotray, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, and I'll be asking you a few health related questions. All questions are mandatory, you can answer in yes or no, okay?

segments.text: Sorry for asking this question but it's mandatory. Have you in the last two years or currently consuming cigarette, beedi, paan, gutka, tobacco or nicotine in any form?

segments.text: Not in a day, ma'am. It's like very occasional, like weekly or socially. One or two.

segments.text: Okay. Have you ever been diagnosed or taken treatment for low or high blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, chest heaviness, chest discomfort, heart murmur, chest pain, chest discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, heart valve disorders, coronary artery disease, congenital heart disease, rheumatic fever, palpitation, shortness of breath or any other shortness of breath or any other heart related complaints?

segments.text: Okay. Any history of any cancer or precancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyps, cysts, nodules, lumps or any type of growth?

segments.text: Diabetes or issues with your blood or urine, hyperthyroidism or hypothyroidism or any other thyroid or endocrine disorders?

segments.text: Okay. Any abnormal findings in any of the investigations done like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, PET scan, MRI scan, endoscopy, colonoscopy, biopsy, treadmill test?

segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So you hereby declare that the information given by you are complete and true and it will form the part of your insurance, it will form the part of your policy record. So, then the case to Tata AIA Life Insurance for further processing. Thank you.
